records.ety: [L. poenalis, fr. poena punishment: cf. F. pnal. See Pain.]

defs: Of or pertaining to punishment, to penalties, or to crimes and offenses; pertaining to criminal jurisprudence
Enacting or threatening punishment; as, a penal statue; the penal code.
Incurring punishment; subject to a penalty; as, a penal act or offense.
Inflicted as punishment; used as a means of punishment; as, a penal colony or settlement.
